title: The Wilderness Woman
writer: Arthur Stringer (story), Arthur Stringer (scenario), Don Bartlett (titles)
actors: Aileen Pringle, Lowell Sherman, Chester Conklin, Henry Vibart
plot: "Kodiak" MacLean, after years of gold prospecting in the Alaskan Klondike, finally strikes it rich and hits a million-dollar bonanza. His daughter, Juneau, immediately thinks it is time to ...
